question: Get species, Common_Name, scientific name, habitat definition, observer, and number observed for all vertebrates observed in numbers greater than 100
gold_sql: select species, Common_Name,  Scientific_Name, Definition, number from VERTEBRATES v join HABITAT_CODES h on v.Habitat = h.Code where number > 100

question: Retrieve the useful life, remaining life, and remaining day parameters for the item that uses depreciation area 'GAAP'?
gold_sql: select UsefulLife, RemainLife, RemainDays from ITM7 where DprArea = 'GAAP'

question: Retrieve municipality key, tax class, and income tax liability for all of the employees of type accountant.
gold_sql: select MunKey, TaxClass, InTaxLiabi from OHEM join OHTY on OHEM.type = OHTY.typeID where OHTY.name = 'Accountant'

question: Return all the number of crashes by vehicle make from most to least
gold_sql: SELECT MAKE, COUNT(*) AS CRASHCOUNT FROM VPICDECODE GROUP BY MAKE ORDER BY CRASHCOUNT DESC

question: Tell me which location IDs have crab type turtle traps? Include only one row per location.
gold_sql: select distinct t.locationid from tblLocations l join tblFieldDataTurtleTrapSurveys t on l.LocationID = t.LocationID where [trap_type] = 'crab'

question: what is the condition number for the 'Dead' condition text entry?
gold_sql: select Cond_Num from tlu_live_dead where Cond_Text = 'Dead'

question: Which island has the fewest stations, and how many stations does it have?
gold_sql: select top 1 Island, count(*) as station_count from tbl_locations loc join tbl_transect trans on loc.location_id = trans.location_id join tbl_stations sta on trans.transect_id = sta.Transect_ID group by Island order by station_count asc

question: Display the useful life, remaining life, and remaining day parameters for the item that uses depreciation area 'GAAP'?
gold_sql: select UsefulLife, RemainLife, RemainDays from ITM7 where DprArea = 'GAAP'

question: Show me the background, foreground, bold, and border red / green / blue values for the reporting elements that have a height less than 5 and greater than 0?
gold_sql: select BGRed, BGGreen, BGBlue, FGRed, FGGreen, FGBlue, MrkrRed, MrkrBlue, MrkrGreen, BrdrRed, BrdrBlue, BrdrGreen from RITM where height < 5 and height > 0

question: Make a list of tire models and the number of vehicles with those tires installed in which tire damage was observed on at least one tire, as indicated by category values other than 0. Display them from most to least common models. Do not include the unknown damage category value 9.
gold_sql: SELECT TIREMODEL, COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(T.CASEID, T.VEHNO)) VEHCOUNT FROM TIRE T LEFT JOIN TIREDAMAGE TD ON T.CASEID = TD.CASEID AND T.VEHNO = TD.VEHNO WHERE DAMAGE > 0 AND DAMAGE <> 9 GROUP BY TIREMODEL ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(T.CASEID, T.VEHNO)) DESC

question: Show the name, ID, description, length, and route of the site with the highest starting Y coordinate.
gold_sql: select top 1 Site_ID, Site_Name, Site_Desc, Length, Route from tbl_Sites order by Site_Start_Y desc

question: List the average potential max sales opportunity amount in local currency per card group
gold_sql: select CardGroup, avg(MaxSumLoc) avgMax from OOPR group by CardGroup

question: Find the project code and name of the projects valid after 2020?
gold_sql: select prjcode, prjname from OPRJ where year(ValidFrom) > 2020

question: What is the average diameter at breast height for  trees of the Acer genus?
gold_sql: select avg(DBH) AvgDBH from tbl_Overstory o join tlu_PlantSpecies p on o.SpCode = p.SpeciesCode where genus = 'Acer'

question: What are the account name and current total balance of accounts with the category name cash
gold_sql: select AcctName, CurrTotal from OACT join OACG on OACT.category = OACG.AbsId where OACG.Name = 'cash'

question: What is the name of the public school district that had the most teachers teaching out of certification in 2021?
gold_sql: select top 1 ENTITY_NAME from [Teachers_Teaching_Out_of_Certification] where year = 2021 	and entity_cd in ( 		select entity_cd 		from [Institution_Grouping] 		where GROUP_NAME = 'public school district' 	) order by NUM_OUT_CERT desc

question: Show the school name and the average weighted index subject score for science for the five lowest scoring public school districts. Exclude weighted index scores with the value 's'.
gold_sql: select top 5 entity_name, avg(cast(weighted_index as float)) averageScienceScore from [ACC_HS_Core_and_Weighted_Performance] where weighted_index <> 's' and subject = 'SCIENCE' and entity_cd in ( 	select entity_cd 	from [Institution_Grouping] 	where GROUP_NAME = 'public school district' ) group by entity_name order by avg(cast(weighted_index as float)) asc

question: Show the notes for gray wolf observations with Bureau of Land Management (BLM) ownership
gold_sql: select notes  from VERTEBRATES where Ownership = 'BLM' and Common_Name like 'gray wolf'

question: Give me the unique category codes for glazing (glass) pre-crash status?
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT GLAZPRE FROM GLAZING

question: Show the annual regents exam percent of LONGWOOD HIGH SCHOOL students at each level from 1 to 5 for the Regents Common Core Algebra I subject taken in 2022. Include the subgroup name, number of students tested, and all of the appropriate percent level score columns.
gold_sql: select SUBGROUP_NAME, tested, PER_LEVEL1, PER_LEVEL2, PER_LEVEL3, PER_LEVEL4, PER_LEVEL5 from [Annual_Regents_Exams] where ENTITY_NAME like '%LONGWOOD HIGH SCHOOL%' 	and year = 2022 	and subject = 'Regents Common Core Algebra I'

question: Show me the dimension code of the cost center named 'General Center 3'?
gold_sql: select DimCode from OPRC where PrcName = 'General Center 3'

question: Display Common_Name and genus species for all invertebrates of class Arachnida
gold_sql: select Common_Name, Genus_species  from INVERTEBRATES where class like 'arachnida'

question: For each canopy position name, show how many overstory were classified for each position for the species with the common name 'Red Maple'
gold_sql: select CanPos_Name, count(*) OverstoryCount from tlu_Can_Pos c join tbl_Overstory o on c.CanPos_Num = o.CanPos join tlu_PlantSpecies s on s.SpeciesCode = o.SpCode where CommonName = 'Red maple' group by CanPos_Name

question: For each habitat definition, show the number of vertebrates and the count of invertebrates records
gold_sql: select definition, vertHabCount, invertHabCount from HABITAT_CODES h join ( 	select Habitat, count(*) vertHabCount 	from VERTEBRATES 	group by habitat ) v on v.Habitat = h.Code join ( 	select Habitat, count(*) invertHabCount 	from INVERTEBRATES 	group by habitat ) i on i.Habitat = h.Code

question: List the number of crashes by vehicle make from most to least. Show how many of these crashes resulted in a fire. Calculate the proportion of total crashes by make to crashes with a fire
gold_sql: SELECT MAKE, COUNT(*) AS CASE_COUNT, SUM(FIRE) AS FIRE_COUNT, (CAST(SUM(FIRE) AS FLOAT)/ CAST(COUNT(*) AS FLOAT)) AS FIRE_PROPORTION FROM VPICDECODE VD 	JOIN FIRE F ON F.CASEID = VD.CASEID AND F.VEHNO = VD.VEHNO GROUP BY MAKE ORDER BY FIRE_PROPORTION DESC

question: Display all the number of crashes by vehicle make from most to least
gold_sql: SELECT MAKE, COUNT(*) AS CRASHCOUNT FROM VPICDECODE GROUP BY MAKE ORDER BY CRASHCOUNT DESC

question: Get county name and total number of teachers teaching out of certification in each county.
gold_sql: select COUNTY_NAME, sum(NUM_OUT_CERT) OOCCount from [Teachers_Teaching_Out_of_Certification] c join [BOCES_and_N/RC] b on c.ENTITY_CD = b.ENTITY_CD group by COUNTY_NAME

question: List names of the financial report categories that have father number 10
gold_sql: select name from OFRC where FatherNum = 10

question: Find events where both nested subplots and decayed logs were observed. Include the number of decayed logs, and the number of nested subplots were observed.
gold_sql: SELECT e.Event_ID, Deadwood_Count, Nest_Count  FROM tbl_Events AS e JOIN (     SELECT Event_ID, COUNT(*) AS Deadwood_Count     FROM tbl_Deadwood     GROUP BY Event_ID ) AS dw ON e.Event_ID = dw.Event_ID JOIN (     SELECT Event_ID, COUNT(*) AS Nest_Count     FROM tbl_Nests     GROUP BY Event_ID ) AS ne ON e.Event_ID = ne.Event_ID order by Deadwood_Count desc

question: What is the count of five year old turtles were measured?
gold_sql: select count(*) turtleCount  from tblFieldDataTurtleMeasurements where age = '5'

question: What are the weather conditions (cloud cover, rain, wind, and gusts) for events entered by Cari Squibb and updated by Seth Judge?
gold_sql: select cloud, rain, wind, gust  from tbl_events e join tbl_Event_Details ed on e.Event_ID = ed.Event_ID where updated_by = 'Seth Judge' and entered_by = 'Cari Squibb'

question: Display bank details, to include bank code, country, account number, branch, and city, for the business partner with the card name Microchips
gold_sql: select OCRB.BankCode, OCRB.Country, Account, Branch, OCRB.City from OCRD join OCRB on OCRD.CardCode = OCRD.CardCode where CardName = 'Microchips'

question: Return date of birth, country of birth, home city, home county, and home country for the employees with the job title of accountant
gold_sql: select birthDate, brthCountr, homeCity, homeCounty, homeCountr from OHEM where jobTitle = 'Accountant'

question: Return professional status and educational statuses as well as the home and work street numbers of employees on the purchasing team.
gold_sql: select StatusOfP, StatusOfE, StreetNoW, StreetNoH from OHEM employees join HTM1 teamMembers on employees.empId = teamMembers.empID join OHTM emplTeams on teamMembers.teamID = emplTeams.teamID where emplTeams.name = 'Purchasing'

question: Count how many incoming invoices document an applied value added tax of more than 700?
gold_sql: select count(*) invoiceCount from RCT2 where vatApplied > 700

question: Show the Common_Name and genus species for all invertebrates of class Arachnida
gold_sql: select Common_Name, Genus_species  from INVERTEBRATES where class like 'arachnida'

question: For the event at the highest elevation recorded on July 28 2009, show the light index, evergreen coverage, litter coverage, vegetation height, and elevation
gold_sql: select top 1 LightIndex, Evergreen, Litter, VegHeight, Elevation from tbl_MicroHabitat m join tbl_Events e on m.Event_ID = e.Event_ID join tbl_Locations l on e.Location_ID = l.Location_ID where year(Start_Date) = 2009 and month(Start_Date) = 7 and day(Start_Date) = 28 order by Elevation desc

question: Show the event notes and location Names from events that started on August 5th, 2011
gold_sql: select Event_Notes, Loc_Name from tbl_Event_Details d join tbl_Events e on e.Event_ID = d.Event_ID join tbl_Locations l on e.Location_ID = l.Location_ID where DAY(Start_Date) = 5 	and MONTH(Start_Date) = 8 	and YEAR(Start_Date) = 2011

question: Show me the background, foreground, bold, and border red / green / blue values for the reporting elements that have a height less than 5 and greater than 0?
gold_sql: select BGRed, BGGreen, BGBlue, FGRed, FGGreen, FGBlue, MrkrRed, MrkrBlue, MrkrGreen, BrdrRed, BrdrBlue, BrdrGreen from RITM where height < 5 and height > 0

question: Display a count of items for each item group. Include the item group name and count of items in the result.
gold_sql: select ItmsGrpNam, count(*) ItmCt from OITM join OITB on OITM.ItmsGrpCod = OITB.ItmsGrpCod group by ItmsGrpNam

question: Count the number of vehicles had tire damage?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) VEHCOUNT FROM ( 	SELECT DISTINCT CASEID, VEHNO 	FROM TIREDAMAGE ) T

question: How many crashes are there where the vehicle-to-vehicle heading angle at impact was between 0 and 90 degrees inclusive?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASEID) CRASHCOUNT FROM CDC WHERE HEADINGANG >= 0 AND HEADINGANG <= 90

question: Show all role IDs of employees whos' salaries are less than 5000?
gold_sql: select roleID from HEM6 join OHEM on HEM6.empID = OHEM.empID where salary < 5000

question: Tell me how many plant species have the term 'native' in their notes? Show a count of these species by their genus. Only include the five highest results.
gold_sql: select top 5 genus, count(*) speciesCount from tlu_PlantSpecies where SpeciesNotes like '%native%' group by genus order by count(*) desc

question: What is the number of stations does each island have?
gold_sql: select Island, count(*) as station_count from tbl_locations loc join tbl_transect trans on loc.location_id = trans.location_id join tbl_stations sta on trans.transect_id = sta.Transect_ID group by Island

question: Retrieve professional status and educational statuses as well as the home and work street numbers of employees on the purchasing team.
gold_sql: select StatusOfP, StatusOfE, StreetNoW, StreetNoH from OHEM employees join HTM1 teamMembers on employees.empId = teamMembers.empID join OHTM emplTeams on teamMembers.teamID = emplTeams.teamID where emplTeams.name = 'Purchasing'

question: What is the total number of vehicles had wrangler model tires?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(CASEID, VEHNO)) VEHCOUNT FROM TIRE WHERE TIREMODEL = 'WRANGLER'

question: Find Dashboard name, dashboard path, status, and query name for dashboards and their queries where the query category is 2
gold_sql: select DashbdName, DashbdPath, Status, QryName from ODAB join DAB1 on ODAB.AbsEntry = DAB1.DsbEntry where QryCtgry = 2

question: Show the length and midpoint diameter of dead wood in the decay stage that has 'log is flat' in the description?
gold_sql: select length, mpd from tbl_Deadwood dw join tlu_DecayStage dc on dw.Decay = dc.DecayStage_ID where DecayStage_Descr like '%log is flat%'

question: Get all the case IDs and vehicle number, recommended and actual tire sizes for vehicles that had a left front tire size that matched the manufacturers first recommended front tire size.
gold_sql: SELECT T.CASEID, T.VEHNO, TIRESIZE, RECFRONT1 FROM TIRE T JOIN TIREPLAC TP ON T.CASEID = TP.CASEID AND T.VEHNO = TP.VEHNO WHERE TIRELOC = 'LF' AND TIRESIZE = RECFRONT1

question: Find project code and name of the projects valid after 2020?
gold_sql: select prjcode, prjname from OPRJ where year(ValidFrom) > 2020

question: Return species, Common_Name, scientific name, habitat definition, observer, and number observed for all vertebrates observed in numbers greater than 100
gold_sql: select species, Common_Name,  Scientific_Name, Definition, number from VERTEBRATES v join HABITAT_CODES h on v.Habitat = h.Code where number > 100

question: Return all professional status and educational statuses as well as the home and work street numbers of employees on the purchasing team.
gold_sql: select StatusOfP, StatusOfE, StreetNoW, StreetNoH from OHEM employees join HTM1 teamMembers on employees.empId = teamMembers.empID join OHTM emplTeams on teamMembers.teamID = emplTeams.teamID where emplTeams.name = 'Purchasing'

question: Return the reason for the most-recent database edit, and what table and field was edited, and when was it changed?
gold_sql: select top 1 Reason, [Table], Field, Date_Change from tbl_Edit_Log order by Date_change desc

question: Make a list of events that are repeat samples that were verified by Lauren Smith, and that includes the event id, station id, and the start date,.
gold_sql: select event_id, station_id, start_date  from tbl_events where repeat_sample = 1 and verified_by = 'Lauren Smith'

question: What are the a count of events in the herpetological survey table, group the counts by weather condition. Also include the mean air and water temperatures.
gold_sql: select weather, count(*) eventCount, avg(airtemp) avgAirTemp, avg(watertemp) avgWaterTemp  from tblEventDataHerps group by weather

question: Return all directions to the plot where the tree with tag number 6 is located?
gold_sql: select directions  from tbl_Tree_Tags t join tbl_Locations l on t.Location_ID = l.Location_ID where Tree_Tag_ID = 6

question: Show the names of the public elementary school entities with level 2 english learner programs that have a non-zero number of english language learners in the all students subgroup, who did not participate in the new york state english as a second language achievement test. Include only one row per school name.
gold_sql: select distinct entity_name from [ACC_EM_ELP]  where entity_cd in ( 	select distinct entity_cd 	from [ACC_EM_NYSESLAT_for_Participation] 	where NYSESLAT_PART = '0' )  	and ELL_COUNT <> '0'  	and SUBGROUP_NAME = 'all students'  	and level = '2' 	and ENTITY_CD in ( 		select entity_cd 		from [Institution_Grouping] 		where group_name = 'Public School' 	)

question: What is the count of events are logged for each Hydrology type?
gold_sql: select Hydrology, count(*) EventCount from tbl_MacroHabitat group by Hydrology

question: Display topographic position description from the topographic position lookup table for the location with X coordinate 269647 and Y coordinate 3943851
gold_sql: select t.TopoPosition from tlu_topo_position t join tbl_Locations l on l.Topo_Position = t.ID where x_coord = 269647 and y_coord = 3943851

question: What are the names of sales employees in the high commission group?
gold_sql: select SlpName from OSLP join OCOG on OSLP.GroupCode = OCOG.GroupCode where GroupName = 'High Commission'

question: Get the Plot ID, x and y coordinates, and directions for the location with the event that has the most nested subplot observations
gold_sql: SELECT Plot_ID, X_Coord, Y_Coord, Directions  from tbl_Locations l JOIN tbl_Events e on e.Location_ID = l.Location_ID WHERE e.Event_ID in ( 	SELECT TOP 1 Event_ID  	from tbl_Nests  	group by Event_ID  	order by count(*)  )

question: How many islands are there?
gold_sql: select count(distinct Island) from tbl_locations

question: Show a count of injuries by severity where the body region is the spine. The lookup code for spine is 6.
gold_sql: SELECT AIS, COUNT(*) INJCOUNT FROM INJURY WHERE REGION = 6 GROUP BY AIS

question: What is the mean diamater of overstory of the montana species observed in events 15 and 16
gold_sql: select avg(DBH) avgDiameter from tbl_events e join tbl_Overstory o on e.Event_ID = o.Event_ID join tlu_PlantSpecies s on o.SpCode = s.SpeciesCode where species = 'montana' 	and e.Event_ID in (15, 16)

question: Show the number of service calls for customer with the 'Silver Warranty' contract template. Include the customer name and number of calls in the result.
gold_sql: select CstmrName, count(*) callCount from OCTR join OSCL on OCTR.CstmrCode = OSCL.customer group by CstmrName

question: Find a number of events by station
gold_sql: select station_id, count(*) event_count from tbl_events group by station_id

question: Return all open and close dates for sales opportunity rows that have a closing percentage of six or less?
gold_sql: select OpenDate, CloseDate from OPR1 where ClosePrcnt <= 6

question: What is the 2022 english language learner count, benchmark size, progress rate, success ration, and level of the english language program at Alfred E Smith Career-Tech HS for the all students subgroup?
gold_sql: select ELL_COUNT, BENCHMARK, PROGRESS_RATE, SUCCESS_RATIO, LEVEL from [ACC_HS_ELP] where ENTITY_NAME = 'ALFRED E SMITH CAREER-TECH HS' 	and SUBGROUP_NAME = 'All Students' 	and year = 2022

question: Show me the names of the five public high school entity having the highest weighted performance index score in math for the all student sub group in 2022? Exclude the value 's' from the index score.
gold_sql: select top 5 p.ENTITY_NAME  from [ACC_HS_Core_and_Weighted_Performance] p join [Institution_Grouping] g on p.ENTITY_CD = g.ENTITY_CD where WEIGHTED_INDEX <> 's' 	and group_name = 'Public School' 	and subject = 'MATH' 	and subgroup_name = 'All Students' 	and year = 2022 order by cast(weighted_index as float) desc

question: For all of the locations with a Midslope topographical position, show the site description, slope, aspect, slope shape, and elevation
gold_sql: select SiteDescription, Slope, Aspect, Slope_shape, Elevation from tbl_Locations l join tlu_topo_position p on l.Topo_Position = p.ID where TopoPosition = 'Midslope'

question: Return a count of vehicles for each type of road rumble strip presence.
gold_sql: SELECT RUMBROAD, COUNT(*) VEHCOUNT FROM GV GROUP BY RUMBROAD

question: List the total occupant count and the mortality count by belt use category. A mortality occured (was fatal) indicated by lookup code 1.
gold_sql: SELECT M.BELTUSE, TOTALCOUNT, MORTALCOUNT FROM ( 	SELECT BELTUSE, COUNT(*) MORTALCOUNT 	FROM OCC 	WHERE MORTALITY = 1 	GROUP BY BELTUSE ) M JOIN ( 	SELECT BELTUSE, COUNT(*) TOTALCOUNT 	FROM OCC 	GROUP BY BELTUSE ) T ON M.BELTUSE = T.BELTUSE

question: List municipality key, tax class, and income tax liability for all of the employees of type accountant.
gold_sql: select MunKey, TaxClass, InTaxLiabi from OHEM join OHTY on OHEM.type = OHTY.typeID where OHTY.name = 'Accountant'

question: Get a list of all of the holiday start and end dates and remarks for holidays in 2014.
gold_sql: select StrDate, EndDate, Rmrks from HLD1 where StrDate >= '20140101 00:00:00.000' 	and EndDate <= '20141231 23:59:59.000'

question: List a count of occupant ejections by sex
gold_sql: SELECT SEX, COUNT(*) FROM OCC JOIN EJECT ON OCC.CASEID = EJECT.CASEID AND OCC.VEHNO = EJECT.VEHNO AND OCC.OCCNO = EJECT.VEHNO GROUP BY SEX

question: Show the Dashboard name, dashboard path, status, and query name for dashboards and their queries where the query category is 2
gold_sql: select DashbdName, DashbdPath, Status, QryName from ODAB join DAB1 on ODAB.AbsEntry = DAB1.DsbEntry where QryCtgry = 2

question: Find all the group name and count of business partners in each card group
gold_sql: select GroupName, count(*) partnerCount from OCRG join OCRD on OCRG.GroupCode = OCRD.GroupCode group by GroupName

question: Which species were documented as road kill at highway mile marker 235? Include only one entry per species type.
gold_sql: select distinct Species  from Roadkill where HWY_Mile_Marker = '235'

question: Show me the background, foreground, bold, and border red / green / blue values for the reporting elements having a height less than 5 and greater than 0?
gold_sql: select BGRed, BGGreen, BGBlue, FGRed, FGGreen, FGBlue, MrkrRed, MrkrBlue, MrkrGreen, BrdrRed, BrdrBlue, BrdrGreen from RITM where height < 5 and height > 0

question: Display percent not tested in 2021 on english language assessment ELA4, for each demographic subgroup at PEMBROKE INTERMEDIATE SCHOOL
gold_sql: select SUBGROUP_NAME, pct_not_tested from [Annual_EM_ELA] where entity_name = 'PEMBROKE INTERMEDIATE SCHOOL'      and ASSESSMENT_NAME = 'ELA4'     and year = 2021

question: List vehicles by make and model and the count of the vehicles that had child car seats; Provide a separate count of how many of these vehicles had distracted drivers.
gold_sql: SELECT MAKE, MODEL, COUNT(*) AS VEHICLE_COUNT, COUNT(DISTRACTN) AS DISTRACTION_COUNT FROM VPICDECODE V JOIN CHILDSEAT C ON V.CASEID = C.CASEID AND V.VEHNO = C.VEHNO  LEFT JOIN DISTRACT D ON D.CASEID = V.CASEID AND D.VEHNO = V.VEHNO GROUP BY MAKE, MODEL ORDER BY DISTRACTION_COUNT DESC

question: Count the number of schools are a part of each board of cooperative educational services in 2020? Show the board name and the count of schools.
gold_sql: select BOCES_NAME, count(distinct school_name) SchoolCount from [BOCES_and_N/RC] where year = 2020 group by BOCES_NAME

gold_sql: select DecayStage_Descr from tlu_DecayStage ds where ds.DecayStage_ID in ( 	select top 1 decay 	from tbl_Deadwood 	order by MPD asc )

question: Show me the Genus, species, and common name of the species with the highest seedling density?

question: Get all account name and current total balance of accounts with the category name cash
gold_sql: select AcctName, CurrTotal from OACT join OACG on OACT.category = OACG.AbsId where OACG.Name = 'cash'

question: Show me the 2022 federal expenditure per student at the public high school with the largest english language learner count in the All Students sub group in their english language program? Include the school name, language learner count, and federal expenditure per student in the result.
gold_sql: select top 1 el.ENTITY_NAME, ELL_COUNT, PER_FED_STATE_LOCAL_EXP from [ACC_HS_ELP] el join [Expenditures_per_Pupil] ex  	on el.ENTITY_CD = ex.ENTITY_CD  	and el.year = ex.year where SUBGROUP_NAME = 'All Students' 	and ELL_COUNT <> 's' 	and ex.YEAR = 2022 	and el.entity_cd in ( 		select entity_cd 		from [Institution_Grouping] 		where GROUP_NAME = 'public school district' 	) order by cast(ELL_COUNT as float) desc

question: Make a list of tire models and the number of vehicles with those tires installed where tire damage was observed on at least one tire, as indicated by category values other than 0. Display them from most to least common models. Do not include the unknown damage category value 9.

question: What are the species, Common_Name, scientific name, habitat definition, observer, and number observed for all vertebrates observed in numbers greater than 100

question: Give me the 2022 high school participation rates and graduation rates for the subgroup 'All Students' who attended Brooklyn Collegiate.
gold_sql: select rate, grad_rate from [ACC_HS_Participation_Rate] p join [ACC_HS_Graduation_Rate] g  	on p.ENTITY_CD = g.ENTITY_CD  	and p.SUBGROUP_NAME = g.SUBGROUP_NAME  	and p.YEAR = g.YEAR  	and p.ENTITY_NAME = g.ENTITY_NAME 	and p.INSTITUTION_ID = g.INSTITUTION_ID where p.ENTITY_NAME = 'Brooklyn Collegiate' and p.SUBGROUP_NAME = 'All Students' and p.year = 2022

question: Tell me the count of events are logged for each Hydrology type?
gold_sql: select Hydrology, count(*) EventCount from tbl_MacroHabitat group by Hydrology

question: List names, mobile phone numbers, and email addresses of sales employees in the high commission group?
gold_sql: select SlpName, Mobil, Email from OSLP join OCOG on OSLP.GroupCode = OCOG.GroupCode where GroupName = 'High Commission'

question: Make a list of event ids for events that have more than 7 observations.
gold_sql: select e.event_id from tbl_events e join tbl_observations o on e.Event_ID = o.Event_ID group by e.event_id having count(*) > 7

question: Get account name and count of journal entries for the general ledger account with code '_SYS00000000002'.
gold_sql: select AcctName, count(*) EntryCount from OACT O join JDT1 J on O.AcctCode = J.Account where Account = '_SYS00000000002' group by Acctname

question: Find all names, mobile phone numbers, and email addresses of sales employees in the high commission group?
gold_sql: select SlpName, Mobil, Email from OSLP join OCOG on OSLP.GroupCode = OCOG.GroupCode where GroupName = 'High Commission'

question: Count the number of plant species have the term 'native' in their notes? Show a count of these species by their genus. Only include the five highest results.
gold_sql: select top 5 genus, count(*) speciesCount from tlu_PlantSpecies where SpeciesNotes like '%native%' group by genus order by count(*) desc

question: Return all average vacation days in the current year for employees on the sales team?
gold_sql: select avg(vacCurYear) from OHEM employees join HTM1 teamMembers on employees.empId = teamMembers.empID join OHTM emplTeams on teamMembers.teamID = emplTeams.teamID where emplTeams.name = 'Sales'

question: Identify which vehicle manufacturer has the most neck injuries?
gold_sql: SELECT TOP 1 MAKE FROM VPICDECODE V JOIN INJURY I ON  V.CASEID = I.CASEID AND V.VEHNO = I.VEHNO WHERE REGION = 3 GROUP BY MAKE ORDER BY COUNT(*)

question: What is the total number of events recorded seedling density data?
gold_sql: select count(distinct Event_ID) EventCount from tbl_Seedlings

question: Display names, mobile phone numbers, and email addresses of sales employees in the high commission group?
gold_sql: select SlpName, Mobil, Email from OSLP join OCOG on OSLP.GroupCode = OCOG.GroupCode where GroupName = 'High Commission'

question: Find cockpit subtable left, right, top, and bottom values for the cockpit named purchase
gold_sql: select CPT1._left, CPT1._right, CPT1._top, CPT1._bottom from OCPT join CPT1 on OCPT.AbsEntry = CPT1.AbsEntry where Name = 'Purchase'

question: What is the first name of the contact associated with the highest number of unique events?
gold_sql: select top 1 First_Name from tlu_Contacts c join xref_Event_Contacts x on c.Contact_ID = x.Contact_ID group by First_Name order by count(distinct event_id) desc

question: Return project code and name of the projects valid after 2020?

question: Display all the Front and rear axle weight ratings for vehicles that have a gross vehicle weight rating between 4000 and 9000

question: List names of the public elementary school entities with level 2 english learner programs that have a non-zero number of english language learners in the all students subgroup, who did not participate in the new york state english as a second language achievement test. Include only one row per school name.

question: Find description and expected costs of project management stages with start dates before october 20th, 2021.

question: What is the count of stations are there?

question: Display bank details, to include bank code, country, account number, branch, and city, for the business partner with the card name Microchips
gold_sql: select OCRB.BankCode, OCRB.Country, Account, Branch, OCRB.City from OCRD join OCRB on OCRD.CardCode = OCRD.CardCode where CardName = 'Microchips'

question: Find all five most common geni observed in nested subplots and how many nested subplotes have they been observed in?
gold_sql: select TOP 5 genus, count(*) as NestCount  from tlu_PlantSpecies join tbl_Nests on tlu_PlantSpecies.SpeciesCode = tbl_Nests.SpCode group by genus order by NestCount desc

question: Count the number of vehicles are there with the driver's current residence ZIP as 95020?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) VEHCOUNT FROM GV  WHERE ZIP = 95020

question: Show me how many habitat codes are there?
gold_sql: select count(*) codeCount from HABITAT_CODES

question: Retrieve cockpit subtable left, right, top, and bottom values for the cockpit named purchase
gold_sql: select CPT1._left, CPT1._right, CPT1._top, CPT1._bottom from OCPT join CPT1 on OCPT.AbsEntry = CPT1.AbsEntry where Name = 'Purchase'

question: Give me the open and close dates for sales opportunity rows that have a closing percentage of six or less?
gold_sql: select OpenDate, CloseDate from OPR1 where ClosePrcnt <= 6

question: Return barcodes for the item named 'Printer Paper A4 White' with unit of measurement entries that are either 3 or 4?
gold_sql: select BcdCode  from OITM join OBCD on OITM.ItemCode = OBCD.ItemCode where ItemName =  'Printer Paper A4 White'       and UomEntry in (3, 4)

question: Get description and expected costs of project management stages with start dates before october 20th, 2021.
gold_sql: select DSCRIPTION, EXPCOSTS from PMG1 where year < '2021-10-20'

question: Give me the date of birth, country of birth, home city, home county, and home country for the employees with the job title of accountant
gold_sql: select birthDate, brthCountr, homeCity, homeCounty, homeCountr from OHEM where jobTitle = 'Accountant'

question: What is the count of places are in each state?
gold_sql: select State, count(*) placeCount from tlu_PlaceNames group by state

question: What is the total number of queries does the dashboard entry with code DAB002 have?
gold_sql: select count(*) queryCount from ODAB join DAB1 on ODAB.AbsEntry = DAB1.DsbEntry where DashbdCode = 'DAB002'

question: Find all combined subject, core and weighted, performance scores for elementary students with disabilities who attended May Moore Primary School?
gold_sql: select core_cohort, weighted_cohort  from [ACC_EM_Core_and_Weighted_Performance] where entity_name = 'May Moore Primary School' 	and subject = 'combined' 	and SUBGROUP_NAME = 'Students with Disabilities'

question: Return background, foreground, bold, and border red / green / blue values for the reporting elements with a height less than 5 and greater than 0?
gold_sql: select BGRed, BGGreen, BGBlue, FGRed, FGGreen, FGBlue, MrkrRed, MrkrBlue, MrkrGreen, BrdrRed, BrdrBlue, BrdrGreen from RITM where height < 5 and height > 0

question: How many roadkill records have a date that is identical to at least on vertebrate record?
gold_sql: select count(*) recordCount from Roadkill r where exists( 	select *  	from vertebrates 	where r.Date = Date )

question: Show the case IDs and vehicle number, recommended and actual tire sizes for vehicles that had a left front tire size that matched the manufacturers first recommended front tire size.
gold_sql: SELECT T.CASEID, T.VEHNO, TIRESIZE, RECFRONT1 FROM TIRE T JOIN TIREPLAC TP ON T.CASEID = TP.CASEID AND T.VEHNO = TP.VEHNO WHERE TIRELOC = 'LF' AND TIRESIZE = RECFRONT1

question: Get the name of the public school district that had the most teachers teaching out of certification in 2021?
gold_sql: select top 1 ENTITY_NAME from [Teachers_Teaching_Out_of_Certification] where year = 2021 	and entity_cd in ( 		select entity_cd 		from [Institution_Grouping] 		where GROUP_NAME = 'public school district' 	) order by NUM_OUT_CERT desc

question: Show me the a count of injuries by body region where the injury severity is critical. The lookup code for critical injury is 5.
gold_sql: SELECT REGION, COUNT(*) INJCOUNT FROM INJURY WHERE AIS = 5 GROUP BY REGION

question: Show me the widest document width for documents with a grid size of 10?
gold_sql: select top 1 Width from RDOC where GridSize = 10 order by width desc

question: Find all table names of business object briefs with the description fields that have the word Memo in them?
gold_sql: select TableName from OBOB where DescField like '%Memo%'

question: Give me the average weight of adjusted jackknife replicate weight 3
gold_sql: SELECT AVG(JKWGT3) WGT3AVG FROM JKWGT

question: Show the event notes and location IDs from events that started on August 5th, 2011
gold_sql: select Event_Notes, Location_ID from tbl_Event_Details d join tbl_Events e on e.Event_ID = d.Event_ID where DAY(Start_Date) = 5 	and MONTH(Start_Date) = 8 	and YEAR(Start_Date) = 2011

question: Tell me which vehicle manufacturer has the most neck injuries?
gold_sql: SELECT TOP 1 MAKE FROM VPICDECODE V JOIN INJURY I ON  V.CASEID = I.CASEID AND V.VEHNO = I.VEHNO WHERE REGION = 3 GROUP BY MAKE ORDER BY COUNT(*)

question: Show the Common_Name and genus species for all invertebrates of class Arachnida
gold_sql: select Common_Name, Genus_species  from INVERTEBRATES where class like 'arachnida'

question: What is the 2022 federal expenditure per student at the public high school with the largest english language learner count in the All Students sub group in their english language program? Include the school name, language learner count, and federal expenditure per student in the result.
gold_sql: select top 1 el.ENTITY_NAME, ELL_COUNT, PER_FED_STATE_LOCAL_EXP from [ACC_HS_ELP] el join [Expenditures_per_Pupil] ex  	on el.ENTITY_CD = ex.ENTITY_CD  	and el.year = ex.year where SUBGROUP_NAME = 'All Students' 	and ELL_COUNT <> 's' 	and ex.YEAR = 2022 	and el.entity_cd in ( 		select entity_cd 		from [Institution_Grouping] 		where GROUP_NAME = 'public school district' 	) order by cast(ELL_COUNT as float) desc

question: Get the Patrick Hart's position and organization?
gold_sql: select position_title, organization from tlu_contacts where First_Name = 'Patrick' and Last_Name = 'Hart'

question: Display description and expected costs of project management stages with start dates before october 20th, 2021.
gold_sql: select DSCRIPTION, EXPCOSTS from PMG1 where year < '2021-10-20'

question: What is the how many minnow traps are there at each location?
gold_sql: select locationID, count(distinct [trap_#]) trapCount from tblFieldDataMinnowTrapSurveys group by locationID

question: Show the names of the public elementary school entities with level 2 english learner programs that have a non-zero number of english language learners in the all students subgroup, who did not participate in the new york state english as a second language achievement test. Include only one row per school name.
gold_sql: select distinct entity_name from [ACC_EM_ELP]  where entity_cd in ( 	select distinct entity_cd 	from [ACC_EM_NYSESLAT_for_Participation] 	where NYSESLAT_PART = '0' )  	and ELL_COUNT <> '0'  	and SUBGROUP_NAME = 'all students'  	and level = '2' 	and ENTITY_CD in ( 		select entity_cd 		from [Institution_Grouping] 		where group_name = 'Public School' 	)

question: List all barcodes for the item named 'Printer Paper A4 White' with unit of measurement entries that are either 3 or 4?
gold_sql: select BcdCode  from OITM join OBCD on OITM.ItemCode = OBCD.ItemCode where ItemName =  'Printer Paper A4 White'       and UomEntry in (3, 4)

question: Retrieve the project code and name of the projects valid after 2020?
gold_sql: select prjcode, prjname from OPRJ where year(ValidFrom) > 2020

question: Give me the average seedling density of the Acer genus?
gold_sql: select avg(Density) avgSeedlingDensity from tbl_seedlings s join tlu_PlantSpecies sp on s.SpCode = sp.SpeciesCode where genus = 'Acer'

question: Count the count of saplings records are there that have an entry higher than 10 in the diameter class 3 field?
gold_sql: select count(*) as SaplingCount from tbl_Saplings where DClass3 > 10

question: List the names of the financial report categories having father number 10
gold_sql: select name from OFRC where FatherNum = 10

question: List the sum of journal entry debits and sum of journal entry credits due in 2021?
gold_sql: select sum(debit) debitSum, sum(credit) creditSum from JDT1 where year(DueDate) = '2021'

question: Count the number of different subjects are present in the new york state english as a second language achievement test data?
gold_sql: select count(distinct subject) subjectCount from [Annual_NYSESLAT]

question: Find the marital status, home street, home block, home zip code, and home state of the employee with the last name Bridi?
gold_sql: select martstatus, homestreet, homeblock, homezip, homestate from OHEM where lastName = 'Bridi'

question: the count of events were documented at each site? Show the site name, site description, and count of events. Only show the 10 sites with the highest number of events.
gold_sql: select top 10 Site_Name, site_Desc, count(*) eventCount from tbl_locations l join tbl_events e on l.Location_ID = e.Location_ID join tbl_Sites s on l.Site_ID = s.Site_ID group by Site_Name, Site_Desc order by count(*) desc

question: List how many minnows of each stage were counted at the location ASIS_HERPS_20H
gold_sql: select stage, sum(count) minnowCountSum from tblFieldDataMinnowTrapSurveys where locationID = 'ASIS_HERPS_20H' group by stage

question: the number of queries does the dashboard entry with code DAB002 have?
gold_sql: select count(*) queryCount from ODAB join DAB1 on ODAB.AbsEntry = DAB1.DsbEntry where DashbdCode = 'DAB002'

question: Find account name and current total balance of accounts with the category name cash
gold_sql: select AcctName, CurrTotal from OACT join OACG on OACT.category = OACG.AbsId where OACG.Name = 'cash'

question: Get a count of observations by species habitat
gold_sql: select habitat, count(*) obsCount from tlu_species s join tbl_observations o on o.Species_ID = s.Species_ID group by habitat

question: Find all names of the five public high school entity that have the highest weighted performance index score in math for the all student sub group in 2022? Exclude the value 's' from the index score.
gold_sql: select top 5 p.ENTITY_NAME  from [ACC_HS_Core_and_Weighted_Performance] p join [Institution_Grouping] g on p.ENTITY_CD = g.ENTITY_CD where WEIGHTED_INDEX <> 's' 	and group_name = 'Public School' 	and subject = 'MATH' 	and subgroup_name = 'All Students' 	and year = 2022 order by cast(weighted_index as float) desc

question: What is the average of the total number of teachers and principals in low-poverty schools statewide?
gold_sql: select avg(TOT_PRINC_LOW) princLow, avg(TOT_TEACH_LOW) teachLow from [Inexperienced_Teachers_and_Principals]

question: What is the count of queries does the dashboard entry with code DAB002 have?
gold_sql: select count(*) queryCount from ODAB join DAB1 on ODAB.AbsEntry = DAB1.DsbEntry where DashbdCode = 'DAB002'

question: What is the useful life, remaining life, and remaining day parameters for the item that uses depreciation area 'GAAP'?
gold_sql: select UsefulLife, RemainLife, RemainDays from ITM7 where DprArea = 'GAAP'

question: What is the widest document width for documents with a grid size of 10?
gold_sql: select top 1 Width from RDOC where GridSize = 10 order by width desc

question: Get all professional status and educational statuses as well as the home and work street numbers of employees on the purchasing team.
gold_sql: select StatusOfP, StatusOfE, StreetNoW, StreetNoH from OHEM employees join HTM1 teamMembers on employees.empId = teamMembers.empID join OHTM emplTeams on teamMembers.teamID = emplTeams.teamID where emplTeams.name = 'Purchasing'

question: Show the date of birth, country of birth, home city, home county, and home country for the employees with the job title of accountant
gold_sql: select birthDate, brthCountr, homeCity, homeCounty, homeCountr from OHEM where jobTitle = 'Accountant'

question: Find professional status, citizenship and passport number  of the employee whos last name is Buyer
gold_sql: select StatusOfP, citizenshp, passportNo from OHEM where lastName = 'Buyer'

question: Return the mean diameter of the fraseri overstory species measurement in each month with an event that measured one?
gold_sql: select month(e.Event_Date) Mon, avg(DBH) avgFraseriDiam from tbl_Overstory o join tbl_events e on e.event_id = o.event_id join tlu_PlantSpecies s on o.SpCode = s.SpeciesCode where s.species = 'fraseri' group by month(e.Event_Date)

question: What species were documented as road kill at highway mile marker 235? Include only one entry per species type.
gold_sql: select distinct Species  from Roadkill where HWY_Mile_Marker = '235'

question: Give me the initials of observers who logged events relating to cover board observations? Include only one row per initials.
gold_sql: select distinct o.ObsInits from Observer_LU o join tlinkObservers tlo on o.ObsInits = tlo.ObsInits join tblEvents e on tlo.EventID = e.EventID join tblFieldDataCoverBoard cb on e.EventID = cb.EventID

question: What are the names of the public elementary school entities with level 2 english learner programs that have a non-zero number of english language learners in the all students subgroup, who did not participate in the new york state english as a second language achievement test. Include only one row per school name.
gold_sql: select distinct entity_name from [ACC_EM_ELP]  where entity_cd in ( 	select distinct entity_cd 	from [ACC_EM_NYSESLAT_for_Participation] 	where NYSESLAT_PART = '0' )  	and ELL_COUNT <> '0'  	and SUBGROUP_NAME = 'all students'  	and level = '2' 	and ENTITY_CD in ( 		select entity_cd 		from [Institution_Grouping] 		where group_name = 'Public School' 	)

question: How many vehicles are there in which there was a yield sign in their environment just prior to the crash? The lookup code for yield sign is 3.
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) VEHCOUNT FROM GV WHERE TRAFDEV = 3

question: Find the station name of the station currently located at UTM coordinates X 272454 Y 2141631
gold_sql: select Station  from tbl_stations  join tbl_Stations_UTMs on tbl_stations.Station_ID = tbl_stations_utms.Station_ID where X_final = 272454 and Y_final = 2141631

question: Find a list of all of the holiday start and end dates and remarks for holidays in 2014.
gold_sql: select StrDate, EndDate, Rmrks from HLD1 where StrDate >= '20140101 00:00:00.000' 	and EndDate <= '20141231 23:59:59.000'

question: What are the annual regents exam percent of LONGWOOD HIGH SCHOOL students at each level from 1 to 5 for the Regents Common Core Algebra I subject taken in 2022. Include the subgroup name, number of students tested, and all of the appropriate percent level score columns.
gold_sql: select SUBGROUP_NAME, tested, PER_LEVEL1, PER_LEVEL2, PER_LEVEL3, PER_LEVEL4, PER_LEVEL5 from [Annual_Regents_Exams] where ENTITY_NAME like '%LONGWOOD HIGH SCHOOL%' 	and year = 2022 	and subject = 'Regents Common Core Algebra I'

question: Show me how many service calls are there for each customer where the priority is medium? (value M) Include the custmer ID and customer name
gold_sql: select customer, custmrName, count(*) callCount from OSCL where priority = 'M' group by customer, custmrName

question: Count the number of events are there?
gold_sql: select count(*) eventCount from tbl_events

question: Get all cockpit subtable left, right, top, and bottom values for the cockpit named purchase
gold_sql: select CPT1._left, CPT1._right, CPT1._top, CPT1._bottom from OCPT join CPT1 on OCPT.AbsEntry = CPT1.AbsEntry where Name = 'Purchase'

question: Give me the average total time from the time an accident occurs to the time that emergency services depart the scene of an accident? Exclude values greater than 1600.
gold_sql: SELECT AVG(SCENEDEP) AVGDEPTIME FROM EMSCARE WHERE SCENEDEP <= 1600
